scope_note: This registry anchors only node identity and each displayed proof-dependency diagram statement. It does not claim that normalized_input, normalized_outcomes, or any node's full quantified contract has been reviewed. Before implementation, read the definitions and theorems cited by the node in original_erdos_64_proof.tex.
